---
name: Documentation or feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to CyberWiki
title: "[ENHANCEMENT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Summary

Provide a clear description of the proposed documentation or feature enhancement, including the domain and entities affected.

# Motivation

Explain why this enhancement is valuable for documenting real-world cybernetic, BCI, EEG, or nanoswarm systems, or for improving governance and integration coverage.

# Technical outline

If applicable, outline the technical changes or new documentation sections required, keeping within the project’s non-fictional scope and editorial rules.

# References

List verifiable sources, standards, or publications that motivate or constrain the requested change.
